page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance type powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers. There are no integrated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r7.32xlarge offers a high density of dedicated physical cores and memory resources, which minimizes virtualization overhead through its 1:1 thread-to-core mapping. This resource profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data caching layers, and large-scale data processing applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors. Operating on the x86_64 architecture at 2.7 GHz, it provides 128 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core memory allocation. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, necessitating external block storage. This high-density memory configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching, and enterprise data processing.
